---
title: "Contact"
description: "Contact links for Shixiong Hu."
---

::: {.eyebrow}
Contact
:::

# For collaboration, talks, and research exchange.

I am interested in collaborations connecting paleoclimate evidence, impact forcing, coupled Earth system modeling, and climate-chemical responses.

::: {.contact-card}
[Shixiong.hu@uconn.edu](mailto:Shixiong.hu@uconn.edu)

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=bmFRpDwAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate)
:::
